---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Faustus Friend
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the problem or workflow pain point — not the solution yet. This
makes it easier to evaluate against the project's principles (see the
[README](../../README.md#principles)) and consider alternative approaches.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant, e.g. mockups, links, or examples from other tools.

---

Please note this project uses a **selective contribution model** — see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md). Requests for gameplay automation,
input injection, or non-Windows support will be declined, as they conflict
with the project's principles.
